queries.sql: WITH throughput_cte AS (SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS events, SUM(throughput_rate) AS total_tput, ROUND(AVG(load_factor), 2) AS avg_load FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone), charge_cte AS (SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE charge_remaining < 25.0) AS low_charge_events FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone) SELECT t.facility_zone, t.events, t.total_tput, t.avg_load, ROUND(CAST(c.low_charge_events AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(t.events, 0) * 100.0, 2) AS error_rate FROM throughput_cte t JOIN charge_cte c ON t.facility_zone = c.facility_zone ORDER BY error_rate DESC

SELECT _timestamp, log, CASE WHEN load_factor < 30.0 THEN 'light' WHEN load_factor < 60.0 THEN 'moderate' WHEN load_factor < 85.0 THEN 'heavy' ELSE 'critical' END AS load_category, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CASE WHEN load_factor < 30.0 THEN 'light' WHEN load_factor < 60.0 THEN 'moderate' WHEN load_factor < 85.0 THEN 'heavy' ELSE 'critical' END ORDER BY load_factor DESC) AS rank_in_category FROM "{stream}" WHERE load_factor IS NOT NULL ORDER BY load_category, rank_in_category

results: Q038 warehouse event record 3 ACK batch batchIdList:Q038-3
Q039 warehouse event record 0 ACK batch batchIdList:Q039-0
Q037 warehouse event record 0 ACK batch batchIdList:Q037-0
Q037 warehouse event record 3 ACK batch batchIdList:Q037-3
Q038 warehouse event record 0 ACK batch batchIdList:Q038-0

queries.sql: SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT sorter_model, ' | ' ORDER BY sorter_model ASC) AS sorter_list FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY facility_zone HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT operation_mode, facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS cnt, SUM(load_factor) AS sum_load, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput FROM "{stream}" WHERE load_factor IS NOT NULL GROUP BY operation_mode, facility_zone ORDER BY sum_load DESC LIMIT 8

SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, sorter_model, throughput_rate, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate) OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY _timestamp ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 2) AS running_avg, ROUND((throughput_rate - AVG(throughput_rate) OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY _timestamp ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)), 2) AS deviation, CASE WHEN throughput_rate > 2 * AVG(throughput_rate) OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone) THEN 'OUTLIER_HIGH' WHEN throughput_rate < 0.5 * AVG(throughput_rate) OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone) THEN 'OUTLIER_LOW' ELSE 'NORMAL' END AS outlier_flag FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL AND facility_zone IS NOT NULL ORDER BY facility_zone ASC, _timestamp ASC

WITH raw AS (SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, sorter_model, throughput_rate, load_factor, charge_remaining FROM "{stream}"), scored AS (SELECT *, ROUND((throughput_rate / NULLIF((SELECT AVG(throughput_rate) FROM raw), 0)) * 0.4 + (load_factor / NULLIF((SELECT AVG(load_factor) FROM raw), 0)) * 0.3 + (charge_remaining / NULLIF((SELECT AVG(charge_remaining) FROM raw), 0)) * 0.3, 4) AS composite_score FROM raw), ranked AS (SELECT *, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY composite_score DESC) AS overall_rank, NTILE(5) OVER (ORDER BY composite_score DESC) AS quintile FROM scored) SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, sorter_model, throughput_rate, load_factor, charge_remaining, composite_score, overall_rank, quintile FROM ranked WHERE quintile <= 2 ORDER BY composite_score DESC

WITH grid AS (SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, sorter_model, throughput_rate, load_factor, charge_remaining, cell_temp FROM "{stream}"), grid_ranked AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC) AS tput_rn, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY load_factor DESC) AS load_rn, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY charge_remaining ASC) AS charge_rn FROM grid), grid_scored AS (SELECT *, (tput_rn + load_rn + charge_rn) AS combined_rank_sum FROM grid_ranked), grid_final AS (SELECT *, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY combined_rank_sum ASC) AS multi_factor_rank FROM grid_scored) SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, sorter_model, throughput_rate, load_factor, charge_remaining, cell_temp, tput_rn, load_rn, charge_rn, combined_rank_sum, multi_factor_rank FROM grid_final WHERE multi_factor_rank <= 3 ORDER BY facility_zone ASC, multi_factor_rank ASC

SELECT t.facility_zone, t.sorter_model, ROUND(AVG(t.throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput, ROUND(AVG(t.load_factor), 2) AS avg_load, ROUND(AVG(t.throughput_rate) - MAX(z.zone_avg_tput), 2) AS tput_vs_zone FROM "{stream}" t JOIN (SELECT facility_zone AS zfz, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS zone_avg_tput FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone) z ON t.facility_zone = z.zfz WHERE t.throughput_rate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.facility_zone, t.sorter_model ORDER BY tput_vs_zone DESC

WITH temp_summary AS (SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS readings, ROUND(AVG(cell_temp), 2) AS mean_temp, ROUND(STDDEV(cell_temp), 2) AS std_temp FROM "{stream}" WHERE cell_temp IS NOT NULL GROUP BY facility_zone), threshold AS (SELECT facility_zone, mean_temp, std_temp, mean_temp + 2 * std_temp AS upper_bound, mean_temp - 2 * std_temp AS lower_bound FROM temp_summary), anomalies AS (SELECT t._timestamp, t.pallet_id, t.facility_zone, t.sorter_model, t.cell_temp, th.mean_temp, th.std_temp, ROUND((t.cell_temp - th.mean_temp) / NULLIF(th.std_temp, 0), 3) AS zscore FROM "{stream}" t JOIN threshold th ON t.facility_zone = th.facility_zone WHERE t.cell_temp > th.upper_bound OR t.cell_temp < th.lower_bound) SELECT *, CASE WHEN zscore > 0 THEN 'SPIKE' ELSE 'DIP' END AS anomaly_type FROM anomalies ORDER BY ABS(zscore) DESC

WITH mode_perf AS (SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS ops, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput, ROUND(AVG(load_factor), 2) AS avg_load FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode), ranked_perf AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY avg_tput DESC) AS perf_rank FROM mode_perf), top_perf AS (SELECT * FROM ranked_perf WHERE perf_rank = 1), charge_status AS (SELECT facility_zone, ROUND(AVG(charge_remaining), 2) AS avg_charge, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE charge_remaining < 30.0) AS low_charge_count FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone) SELECT tp.facility_zone, tp.operation_mode AS best_mode, tp.avg_tput, tp.avg_load, cs.avg_charge, cs.low_charge_count, CASE WHEN cs.avg_charge < 40.0 AND tp.avg_tput > 400.0 THEN 'REBALANCE' WHEN cs.avg_charge < 40.0 THEN 'RECHARGE' WHEN tp.avg_tput < 200.0 THEN 'OPTIMIZE' ELSE 'STABLE' END AS action FROM top_perf tp JOIN charge_status cs ON tp.facility_zone = cs.facility_zone ORDER BY tp.avg_tput DESC

SELECT COUNT(_timestamp) as cnt, (CASE WHEN (json_get_str(json_get_json(request_payload, 'message'), 'endpoint') = 'searchItems' OR json_get_str(json_get_json(request_payload, 'message'), 'endpoint') = 'createItem' OR json_get_str(json_get_json(request_payload, 'message'), 'endpoint') = 'deleteItem') THEN NULL ELSE json_get_str(json_get_json(request_payload, 'message'), 'endpoint') END) as service FROM "{stream}" WHERE match_all('warehouse event record') GROUP BY service HAVING service IS NOT NULL

SELECT spath(unnest(flatten(cast_to_arr(phase_data))), 'name') as phasename, count(_timestamp) as count_s, spath(unnest(flatten(cast_to_arr(phase_data))), 'startTime') as starttime FROM "{stream}" WHERE sorter_model = 'SORT-X1' GROUP BY phasename, starttime

expected.note: Array flattening with spath, unnest, flatten, cast_to_arr — OO-specific, skip_sqllogictest

queries.sql: SELECT COALESCE(graphql_operation, 'N/A') AS graphql_operation FROM "{stream}" WHERE page_slug = 'itemPage'   AND lower(graphql_operation) IN ('updateitems', 'placeorder', 'verifypayment', 'updatecart')   AND status_code = '200'   AND (     array_has(cast_to_arr(risk_rules_list), 'rate_limit_exceeded')     OR array_has(cast_to_arr(risk_rules_list), 'credential_stuffing')     OR array_has(cast_to_arr(risk_rules_list), 'session_hijack')   )   AND (info_tag IS NULL OR info_tag NOT LIKE '%Allowlisted%') LIMIT 5

expected.note: array_has + cast_to_arr + COALESCE + lower() IN — OO-specific array functions, skip_sqllogictest

queries.sql:
SELECT page_slug,
  attack_name,
  COALESCE(info_tag, 'N/A') AS info_tag,
  geo_country,
  geo_user_type,
  device_type,
  os_platform,
  datacenter,
  COUNT(*) AS blockcount
FROM "{stream}"
WHERE (user_agent_str LIKE '%Chrome%' OR os_platform LIKE '%Android%')
  AND issue_type != 'N/A'
GROUP BY page_slug, attack_name, info_tag, geo_country, geo_user_type, device_type, os_platform, datacenter
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY blockcount DESC

SELECT facility_zone,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  AVG(throughput_rate) AS avg_throughput,
  SUM(CASE WHEN operation_mode = 'auto' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS auto_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN operation_mode = 'manual' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS manual_count
FROM "{stream}"
WHERE match_all('warehouse')
  AND load_factor > 10.0
  AND facility_zone IN ('ZONE-1', 'ZONE-2', 'ZONE-3')
  AND throughput_rate >= 100.0
GROUP BY facility_zone
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
  AND AVG(throughput_rate) > 150.0
ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT api_name,
  json_get_str(json_get_json(request_payload, 'message'), 'status') AS req_status,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  AVG(latency_ms) AS avg_latency
FROM "{stream}"
WHERE json_get_str(json_get_json(request_payload, 'message'), 'status') IS NOT NULL
  AND json_get_str(json_get_json(request_payload, 'message'), 'status') != ''
  AND latency_ms > 0
GROUP BY api_name, json_get_str(json_get_json(request_payload, 'message'), 'status')
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 15

SELECT facility_zone,
  UPPER(operation_mode) AS op_mode,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  AVG(load_factor) AS avg_load,
  MAX(cell_temp) AS max_temp,
  SUM(throughput_rate) AS total_throughput,
  AVG(latency_ms) AS avg_latency,
  (MAX(_timestamp) - MIN(_timestamp)) / 1000000 AS span_seconds
FROM "{stream}"
WHERE (operation_mode = 'auto' OR operation_mode = 'hybrid')
  AND load_factor > 20.0
GROUP BY facility_zone, UPPER(operation_mode)
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
ORDER BY span_seconds DESC, cnt DESC

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN load_factor >= 70.0 THEN 'HIGH_LOAD'
    WHEN load_factor >= 40.0 THEN 'MED_LOAD'
    ELSE 'LOW_LOAD'
  END AS load_category,
  CASE
    WHEN throughput_rate >= 500.0 THEN 'HIGH_TPUT'
    WHEN throughput_rate >= 200.0 THEN 'MED_TPUT'
    ELSE 'LOW_TPUT'
  END AS throughput_category,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  AVG(cell_temp) AS avg_temp,
  SUM(item_count) AS total_items,
  MAX(defect_limit) AS max_defect
FROM "{stream}"
WHERE facility_zone LIKE 'ZONE-%'
GROUP BY
  CASE
    WHEN load_factor >= 70.0 THEN 'HIGH_LOAD'
    WHEN load_factor >= 40.0 THEN 'MED_LOAD'
    ELSE 'LOW_LOAD'
  END,
  CASE
    WHEN throughput_rate >= 500.0 THEN 'HIGH_TPUT'
    WHEN throughput_rate >= 200.0 THEN 'MED_TPUT'
    ELSE 'LOW_TPUT'
  END
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN page_slug = 'itemPage' AND (action_category = 'navigation' AND action_subcategory = 'clickEvent') THEN 'item_click' WHEN page_slug = 'cartPage' AND (action_category = 'interaction' AND response_code = 200) THEN 'cart_success' WHEN page_slug = 'itemPage' AND (action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND error_code IN ('E001', 'E003')) THEN 'item_error' ELSE 'other' END AS event_class, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY event_class

SELECT page_slug, COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(CASE WHEN response_code >= 400 THEN 1 END) AS error_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN latency_ms > 500 THEN 1 END) AS slow_count FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY page_slug HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN response_code >= 400 THEN 1 END) >= 1 OR COUNT(CASE WHEN latency_ms > 500 THEN 1 END) >= 1

SELECT os_platform, action_category, COUNT(*) AS total, (100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN response_code >= 400 THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*)) AS error_pct FROM "{stream}" WHERE os_platform IN ('Android 14', 'iOS 17.4', 'Windows 11') GROUP BY os_platform, action_category HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN response_code >= 400 THEN 1 END) > 0
SELECT coalesce(page_url, concat(page_slug, '-fallback')) AS page_label, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY page_label ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT (CASE WHEN char_length(exception_message) > 20 THEN substring(exception_message, 1, 20) || '...' ELSE exception_message END) AS short_error, error_code, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND error_code NOT IN ('E002', 'E004') AND exception_message IS NOT NULL GROUP BY short_error, error_code ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT component_name, page_slug, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_latency, MAX(latency_ms) AS max_latency FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms > 0 GROUP BY component_name, page_slug HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1 AND AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) > 0

SELECT (CASE WHEN page_slug IN ('itemPage', 'searchPage') AND action_category = 'navigation' THEN 'browse' WHEN page_slug IN ('cartPage', 'checkoutPage') AND action_category = 'interaction' THEN 'purchase' WHEN action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND error_code NOT IN ('E001', 'E002') THEN 'monitoring' ELSE 'other' END) AS session_type, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY session_type

SELECT error_code, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND exception_message LIKE '%Exception%' GROUP BY error_code HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1 AND COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) >= 1

SELECT (CASE WHEN os_platform LIKE '%Android%' THEN 'Android' WHEN os_platform LIKE '%iOS%' OR os_platform LIKE '%iPhone%' THEN 'iOS' ELSE 'Other' END) AS platform, page_slug, action_category, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name = 'warehouse-east' GROUP BY platform, page_slug, action_category HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT coalesce(device_type, 'unknown') AS device, COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(CASE WHEN response_code >= 400 THEN 1 END) AS errors, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_latency FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms > 0 GROUP BY device HAVING AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) > 100 OR COUNT(CASE WHEN response_code >= 400 THEN 1 END) > 2

SELECT (CASE WHEN latency_ms < 100 THEN 'fast' WHEN latency_ms < 500 THEN 'medium' WHEN latency_ms < 1000 THEN 'slow' ELSE 'timeout' END) AS response_class, (CASE WHEN response_code = 200 THEN 'success' WHEN response_code >= 400 THEN 'error' ELSE 'other' END) AS status_class, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms > 0 GROUP BY response_class, status_class ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT action_subcategory, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category NOT IN ('interaction', 'navigation') AND error_code NOT IN ('E003', 'E005') AND exception_message NOT LIKE '%NonexistentPattern%' GROUP BY action_subcategory HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1

SELECT coalesce(component_name, 'unknown_component') AS comp, coalesce(error_code, 'no_error') AS err, COUNT(*) AS cnt, (CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 3 THEN 'high' WHEN COUNT(*) > 1 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'low' END) AS severity FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' GROUP BY comp, err ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT page_slug, COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(CASE WHEN exception_message LIKE '%Exception%' THEN 1 END) AS exceptions, (100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN exception_message LIKE '%Exception%' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*)) AS exception_rate FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY page_slug HAVING (100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN exception_message LIKE '%Exception%' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*)) > 20

SELECT coalesce(tag_a, 'unknown') AS env, (CASE WHEN build_version IN ('v1.0.0', 'v1.1.2') THEN 'legacy' WHEN build_version IN ('v2.0.0', 'v2.1.3', 'v2.2.0') THEN 'current' ELSE 'other' END) AS version_class, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY env, version_class ORDER BY env, version_class

SELECT (CASE WHEN os_platform LIKE '%Android%' THEN 'android' WHEN os_platform LIKE '%iOS%' OR os_platform LIKE '%iPhone%' OR os_platform LIKE '%Mac%' THEN 'ios' ELSE 'other' END) AS platform_family, (CASE WHEN device_type IN ('Mobile', 'Tablet') THEN 'mobile' WHEN device_type = 'Computer' THEN 'desktop' ELSE 'unknown' END) AS device_family, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY platform_family, device_family HAVING COUNT(*) > 2

SELECT record_type, action_category, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE (page_slug = 'itemPage' AND action_category IN ('navigation', 'performanceMetric')) OR (page_slug = 'cartPage' AND action_category IN ('interaction', 'navigation')) OR (page_slug = 'checkoutPage' AND response_code >= 400) GROUP BY record_type, action_category ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT org_name, COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(CASE WHEN response_code = 200 THEN 1 END) AS successes, (100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN response_code = 200 THEN 1 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)) AS success_rate FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' GROUP BY org_name ORDER BY success_rate DESC

SELECT page_slug, MIN(latency_ms) AS min_lat, MAX(latency_ms) AS max_lat, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms > 0 GROUP BY page_slug HAVING MAX(latency_ms) - MIN(latency_ms) > 200 AND COUNT(*) >= 2

SELECT action_category, page_slug, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS users, COUNT(DISTINCT component_name) AS unique_components FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name = 'warehouse-east' AND build_version IS NOT NULL AND action_category IN ('performanceMetric', 'navigation', 'interaction') AND page_slug IN ('itemPage', 'cartPage', 'checkoutPage') GROUP BY action_category, page_slug ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT action_category, COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(CASE WHEN response_code >= 400 THEN 1 END) AS errors, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN response_code >= 400 THEN 1 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS error_rate FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category IS NOT NULL GROUP BY action_category HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN response_code >= 400 THEN 1 END) > 0 ORDER BY error_rate DESC

SELECT page_slug, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat, MAX(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS max_lat FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms > 0 AND page_slug IS NOT NULL GROUP BY page_slug HAVING AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) > 100 AND COUNT(*) >= 2 ORDER BY avg_lat DESC, page_slug ASC

SELECT _timestamp, action_category, page_slug, error_code, exception_message FROM "{stream}" WHERE (action_category = 'performanceMetric' AND error_code IS NOT NULL) OR (action_category = 'interaction' AND exception_message LIKE '%Exception%') ORDER BY action_category, _timestamp ASC LIMIT 15

results: TimeoutException: lane LANE-A did not respond within 5000ms
SecurityException: unauthorized access to control_center CC-ALPHA
SecurityException: unauthorized access to control_center CC-ALPHA

queries.sql: SELECT org_name, action_category, COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(DISTINCT visitor_session_id) AS unique_users, COUNT(DISTINCT component_name) AS unique_components, COUNT(DISTINCT page_slug) AS unique_pages FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY org_name, action_category ORDER BY total DESC, org_name ASC, action_category ASC

SELECT _timestamp, (CASE WHEN latency_ms < 100 THEN 'fast' WHEN latency_ms < 500 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'slow' END) AS speed, component_name, page_slug FROM "{stream}" WHERE (CASE WHEN latency_ms < 100 THEN 'fast' WHEN latency_ms < 500 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'slow' END) IN ('slow', 'medium') AND component_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY latency_ms DESC, _timestamp ASC LIMIT 12

SELECT org_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt, MIN(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS min_lat, MAX(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS max_lat, ROUND(STDDEV(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)), 2) AS stddev_lat FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms > 0 AND org_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY org_name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1 AND MAX(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) > 0 ORDER BY stddev_lat DESC NULLS LAST, org_name ASC

SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate > (SELECT AVG(CAST(throughput_rate AS FLOAT)) FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric') AND action_category = 'performanceMetric' ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC, pallet_id ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT COALESCE(page_url, resource_path, 'unknown') AS url_source, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)), 1) AS avg_lat FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms > 0 GROUP BY COALESCE(page_url, resource_path, 'unknown') HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY cnt DESC, url_source ASC

SELECT action_category, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category IS NOT NULL GROUP BY action_category ORDER BY (CASE WHEN action_category = 'performanceMetric' THEN 1 WHEN action_category = 'navigation' THEN 2 WHEN action_category = 'interaction' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END) ASC

SELECT action_subcategory, COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(CASE WHEN response_code = 200 THEN 1 END) AS ok, COUNT(CASE WHEN response_code >= 500 THEN 1 END) AS server_err, COUNT(CASE WHEN error_code IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS has_error_code FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_subcategory IS NOT NULL GROUP BY action_subcategory ORDER BY total DESC, action_subcategory ASC

SELECT CASE WHEN auth_result = 'pass' AND response_code < 400 THEN 'success' WHEN auth_result = 'pass' AND response_code >= 400 THEN 'app_error' WHEN auth_result IN ('fail', 'denied') THEN 'auth_failure' ELSE 'unknown' END AS outcome_class, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(org_name, site_name)) AS distinct_tenants FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY outcome_class ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT COALESCE(scan_category, 'none') AS scan_type, CASE WHEN CHAR_LENGTH(COALESCE(exception_message, '')) > 40 THEN 'long_error' WHEN CHAR_LENGTH(COALESCE(exception_message, '')) > 0 THEN 'short_error' ELSE 'no_error' END AS error_class, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(CAST(COUNT(*) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY COALESCE(scan_category, 'none')), 1) AS pct_within_scan FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY scan_type, error_class ORDER BY scan_type, cnt DESC

SELECT device_type, page_slug, COUNT(*) AS page_views, AVG(CAST(lcp_micros AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lcp, AVG(CAST(inp_micros AS FLOAT)) AS avg_inp, AVG(CAST(cls_score AS FLOAT)) AS avg_cls FROM "{stream}" WHERE device_type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY device_type, page_slug ORDER BY page_views DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT tag_b AS severity, SUM(CASE WHEN re_match(exception_message, 'NullPointer|Timeout|Resource') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS infra_errors, SUM(CASE WHEN re_match(exception_message, 'Security|Validation|Configuration') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS app_errors, COUNT(*) AS total FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY severity ORDER BY total DESC

SELECT CAST(COALESCE(bot_flag, info_tag, 'none') AS VARCHAR) AS flag_status, CASE WHEN threat_flag = 'true' THEN 'threat' WHEN passthrough_flag = 'true' THEN 'passthrough' ELSE 'normal' END AS traffic_type, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY flag_status, traffic_type ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT region_code, COUNT(*) AS total_events, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE auth_result = 'fail') AS auth_failures, ROUND(CAST(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE auth_result = 'fail') AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS failure_pct FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY region_code HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY failure_pct DESC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '1 minute') AS _time, SUM(CASE WHEN re_match(exception_message, 'Exception|Error|Timeout') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS error_count, COUNT(*) AS total, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN re_match(exception_message, 'Exception|Error|Timeout') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS error_pct FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time

SELECT _timestamp, COALESCE(upstream_error_code, error_code, 'NO_ERROR') AS effective_error, COALESCE(endpoint_path, resource_path, uri_path, '/unknown') AS effective_path FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 15
SELECT _timestamp, COALESCE(visitor_session_id, cookie_id, 'anon') AS session_key, COALESCE(page_url, 'about:blank') AS nav_target FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 15

SELECT CASE WHEN throughput_rate < 200 THEN 'low' WHEN throughput_rate < 500 THEN 'medium' WHEN throughput_rate < 800 THEN 'high' ELSE 'extreme' END AS tput_bucket, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(load_factor), 2) AS avg_load FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY tput_bucket ORDER BY tput_bucket

SELECT CASE WHEN latency_ms < 100 THEN 'fast' WHEN latency_ms < 1000 THEN 'normal' ELSE 'slow' END AS speed, action_category, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY speed, action_category ORDER BY speed, action_category
SELECT _timestamp, exception_message, error_code FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(exception_message, 'Exception') AND re_not_match(exception_message, 'Timeout') ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 10

results: SecurityException: unauthorized access to control_center CC-ALPHA

queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(org_name, 'warehouse') AND re_not_match(org_name, 'central') AND re_not_match(org_name, 'north')
SELECT _timestamp, json_get_str(request_payload, 'endpoint') AS ep, json_get_str(request_payload, 'status') AS st FROM "{stream}" WHERE request_payload IS NOT NULL ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 10

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minute') AS _time, facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 1) AS avg_tput FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(facility_zone, 'ZONE-[1-4]') GROUP BY _time, facility_zone ORDER BY _time, facility_zone

SELECT _timestamp, os_platform, CASE WHEN os_platform LIKE 'Android%' THEN 'Android' WHEN os_platform LIKE 'iOS%' THEN 'iOS' WHEN os_platform LIKE 'Windows%' THEN 'Windows' WHEN os_platform LIKE 'Linux%' THEN 'Linux' ELSE 'Other' END AS os_family FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 15

SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE re_match(error_code, 'E00[1-4]')) AS minor_errors, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE re_match(error_code, 'E00[5-9]|E010')) AS major_errors FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone ORDER BY facility_zone
SELECT _timestamp, COALESCE(NULLIF(upstream_error_code, 'UP-E001'), error_code) AS deduped_error FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 15

SELECT _timestamp, sorter_model, throughput_rate, ROUND(throughput_rate / NULLIF((SELECT AVG(throughput_rate) FROM "{stream}" t2 WHERE t2.facility_zone = t1.facility_zone), 0), 2) AS zone_ratio FROM "{stream}" t1 ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 10

SELECT COALESCE(page_slug, 'unknown') AS page, action_category, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(COALESCE(action_subcategory, ''), 'vitals|metric') GROUP BY page, action_category ORDER BY page, action_category

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '1 minute') AS _time, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE str_match_ignore_case(log, 'error')) AS error_hits, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE str_match_ignore_case(log, 'ack')) AS ack_hits, COUNT(*) AS total FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time

SELECT _timestamp, COALESCE(bot_flag, 'unknown') AS bot, passthrough_flag, CASE WHEN bot_flag = 'true' THEN 'automated' WHEN passthrough_flag = 'true' THEN 'forwarded' ELSE 'direct' END AS traffic_type FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 15
SELECT org_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(org_name, 'warehouse') GROUP BY org_name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '30 second') AS _time, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE re_match(log, 'ACK')) AS ack_logs, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE re_match(log, 'error')) AS error_logs FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time
SELECT _timestamp, log, exception_message FROM "{stream}" WHERE str_match_ignore_case(log, 'warehouse') AND re_match(exception_message, 'Exception|Error') ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 10

results: Q609 warehouse event record 0 ACK batch batchIdList:Q609-0
Q609 warehouse event record 3 ACK batch batchIdList:Q609-3
TimeoutException: lane LANE-A did not respond within 5000ms
Q610 warehouse event record 0 ACK batch batchIdList:Q610-0
TimeoutException: lane LANE-A did not respond within 5000ms
Q610 warehouse event record 3 ACK batch batchIdList:Q610-3
SecurityException: unauthorized access to control_center CC-ALPHA

queries.sql: WITH base AS (SELECT _timestamp, facility_zone, component_name, throughput_rate, latency_ms, response_code, auth_result FROM "{stream}"), ranked AS (SELECT *, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC) AS rate_rank, CASE WHEN response_code >= 400 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_error FROM base) SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(is_error) AS errors, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat, MAX(CASE WHEN rate_rank = 1 THEN throughput_rate END) AS peak_rate FROM ranked GROUP BY facility_zone ORDER BY peak_rate DESC

WITH perf AS (SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, AVG(throughput_rate) AS avg_rate, AVG(load_factor) AS avg_load FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode), perf_ranked AS (SELECT *, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY avg_rate DESC) AS global_rank, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY operation_mode ORDER BY avg_rate DESC) AS mode_rank FROM perf) SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, avg_rate, avg_load, global_rank, mode_rank FROM perf_ranked WHERE global_rank <= 5 OR mode_rank <= 3 ORDER BY global_rank LIMIT 12

SELECT COALESCE(scan_category, 'unknown') AS scan_type, CASE WHEN CHAR_LENGTH(COALESCE(exception_message, '')) > 40 THEN 'long_error' WHEN CHAR_LENGTH(COALESCE(exception_message, '')) > 0 THEN 'short_error' ELSE 'no_error' END AS error_class, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(CAST(COUNT(*) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY COALESCE(scan_category, 'unknown')), 1) AS pct FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY scan_type, error_class ORDER BY scan_type, cnt DESC

SELECT device_type, page_slug, COUNT(*) AS page_views, AVG(CAST(lcp_micros AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lcp, AVG(CAST(inp_micros AS FLOAT)) AS avg_inp, AVG(CAST(cls_score AS FLOAT)) AS avg_cls FROM "{stream}" WHERE device_type IS NOT NULL AND page_slug IS NOT NULL GROUP BY device_type, page_slug ORDER BY page_views DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT tag_b AS severity, SUM(CASE WHEN re_match(exception_message, 'NullPointer|Timeout|Resource') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS infra_errors, SUM(CASE WHEN re_match(exception_message, 'Security|Validation|Configuration') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS app_errors, COUNT(*) AS total FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY severity ORDER BY total DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN auth_result = 'pass' AND response_code < 400 THEN 'success' WHEN auth_result = 'pass' AND response_code >= 400 THEN 'app_error' WHEN auth_result IN ('fail', 'denied') THEN 'auth_failure' ELSE 'unknown' END AS outcome, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(org_name, site_name)) AS distinct_tenants FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY outcome ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT COALESCE(bot_flag, info_tag, 'none') AS flag, CASE WHEN threat_flag = 'true' THEN 'threat' WHEN passthrough_flag = 'true' THEN 'passthrough' ELSE 'normal' END AS traffic_type, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY flag, traffic_type ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT region_code, COUNT(*) AS total_events, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE auth_result = 'fail') AS failures, ROUND(CAST(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE auth_result = 'fail') AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS failure_pct FROM "{stream}" WHERE region_code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY region_code HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY failure_pct DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10

WITH zone_stats AS (SELECT facility_zone, AVG(throughput_rate) AS avg_rate, AVG(load_factor) AS avg_load, STDDEV(throughput_rate) AS std_rate FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone), zone_stats2 AS (SELECT facility_zone, AVG(throughput_rate) AS avg_rate2, AVG(load_factor) AS avg_load2 FROM "{stream2}" GROUP BY facility_zone) SELECT z.facility_zone, z.avg_rate, z.avg_load, z.std_rate, z2.avg_rate2, z2.avg_load2, CASE WHEN z.avg_rate > z2.avg_rate2 THEN 'primary_faster' ELSE 'secondary_faster' END AS comparison FROM zone_stats z LEFT JOIN zone_stats2 z2 ON z.facility_zone = z2.facility_zone ORDER BY z.facility_zone

SELECT component_name, COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE match_all('error')) AS fts_errors, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE match_all('warehouse')) AS fts_hits, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS freq_rank FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY component_name ORDER BY freq_rank LIMIT 10

SELECT COALESCE(geo_country, 'unknown') AS country, COALESCE(geo_user_type, 'unknown') AS user_type, COUNT(*) AS cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN re_match(attack_name, 'SQL|XSS|Injection') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS critical_attacks, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat FROM "{stream}" WHERE geo_country IS NOT NULL GROUP BY country, user_type ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 12

WITH zone_perf AS (SELECT facility_zone, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY throughput_rate) AS median_rate, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.9) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY throughput_rate) AS p90_rate FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone), zone_lat AS (SELECT facility_zone, AVG(CAST(latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY facility_zone) SELECT zp.facility_zone, zp.median_rate, zp.p90_rate, zl.avg_lat FROM zone_perf zp LEFT JOIN zone_lat zl ON zp.facility_zone = zl.facility_zone ORDER BY zp.median_rate DESC

SELECT a.geo_org, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(CAST(a.latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat_a, AVG(CAST(b.latency_ms AS FLOAT)) AS avg_lat_b, COUNT(DISTINCT a.visitor_session_id) AS distinct_sessions FROM "{stream}" a JOIN "{stream2}" b ON a.geo_org = b.geo_org WHERE a.geo_org IS NOT NULL GROUP BY a.geo_org ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10

WITH error_detail AS (SELECT _timestamp, component_name, exception_message, response_code, re_match(exception_message, 'NullPointer|Timeout|Security') AS is_critical FROM "{stream}" WHERE exception_message IS NOT NULL) SELECT component_name, COUNT(*) AS error_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN is_critical THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS critical_cnt, AVG(CAST(response_code AS FLOAT)) AS avg_response_code FROM error_detail GROUP BY component_name ORDER BY error_cnt DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS total_events, SUM(throughput_rate) AS total_rate, AVG(load_factor) AS avg_load, STDDEV(cell_temp) AS std_temp, SUM(CASE WHEN match_all('warehouse') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fts_hits FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone ORDER BY total_rate DESC
